title: Google calendar
excerpt: I use to be able to see availability for scheduling purposes on Google calendar.  I can no longer view it.  My call center cannot schedule without knowing availaibility.  I need this ASAP or we will need to leave Mondays…

posts.author: SRussell2573 (Suzy)
posts.cookedHtml: I use to be able to see availability for scheduling purposes on Google calendar. I can no longer view it. My call center cannot schedule without knowing availaibility. I need this ASAP or we will need to leave Mondays. It use to be on here, but is no longer. The rep said that they took the ability away with an upgrade.
